---
# ActiveDocs Documentation

> Explore guides and tutorials to start building with ActiveDocs.

## Sections

- [Developers]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/llms.txt) — Build integrated document automation solutions with the ActiveDocs API.
- [Template Designers]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/llms.txt) — No-code intelligent template building.

## All Pages

### Developers — API Reference

- [API Overview]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-overview/llms.txt) — Architecture, authentication, and conventions.
- [Automated Document Production]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-jobs/llms.txt) — Jobs API for document assembly.
- [Design Component Management]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-design-components/llms.txt) — Templates, snippets, data views.
- [Document Management]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-documents/llms.txt) — Document search, retrieval, and workflow.
- [Document Sets]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-document-sets/llms.txt) — Document set management.
- [Delivery Management]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-delivery/llms.txt) — Delivery queues and status.
- [Subsites and Users]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-subsites-users/llms.txt) — User and subsite management.
- [Diagnostics]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-diagnostics/llms.txt) — Health checks and site management.

### Developers — Integration Guides

- [Getting Started]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/integration-getting-started/llms.txt) — First document creation walkthrough.
- [Answer Data Structures]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/answer-data-structures/llms.txt) — Field types and answer formats.
- [Document Delivery]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/document-delivery-guide/llms.txt) — Email, print, file delivery.
- [Document Wizard Integration]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/wizard-integration/llms.txt) — Embed and customize the wizard.
- [Wizard Event Handlers]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/wizard-event-handlers/llms.txt) — Step interception and validation.

### Developers — Advanced Topics

- [Data View Web Services]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/data-view-web-services/llms.txt) — OData V4 data sources.
- [Document Management Services]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/document-management-services/llms.txt) — External DMS integrations.
- [Custom Themes and Localization]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/custom-themes-localization/llms.txt) — UI customization.
- [Custom Reporting]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/custom-reporting/llms.txt) — RDLC reports.
- [PowerShell Server Configuration]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/powershell-server-config/llms.txt) — Server administration.

### Template Designers

- [Glossary of Terms]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/glossary/llms.txt) — Key terminology.
- [Design Components]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-components/llms.txt) — Templates, Snippets, Data Views.
- [Design Items]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-items/llms.txt) — Active Fields, Groups, Rules.
- [Introduction to WorkCenter Client]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workcenter-client/llms.txt) — WorkCenter Client navigation.
- [WorkCenter Sites]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workcenter-sites/llms.txt) — Site connections.
- [Folders and Organization]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/folders-and-organization/llms.txt) — Folders and categories.
- [Template Design Process]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/template-design-process/llms.txt) — Planning and importing templates.
- [The ActiveDocs Ribbon]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/activedocs-ribbon/llms.txt) — Design tools overview.
- [The Design Items Dialog]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-items-dialog/llms.txt) — Design Items management interface.
- [Groups and Active Fields]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/groups-and-active-fields/llms.txt) — Creating groups and fields.
- [The Designer Pane]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/designer-pane/llms.txt) — Marker management.
- [Data Views]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/data-views/llms.txt) — External data connections.
- [Importing Design Items]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/importing-design-items/llms.txt) — Import from various sources.
- [Rules]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/rules/llms.txt) — Conditional content and questions.
- [Snippets and Snippet Links]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/snippets-and-snippet-links/llms.txt) — Reusable content.
- [Wizard Step Management]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/wizard-step-management/llms.txt) — Step ordering.
- [Repeating Item Groups]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/repeating-item-groups/llms.txt) — Repeating data.
- [Local Template Options]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/local-template-options/llms.txt) — Template settings.
- [Design Item Sets]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-item-sets/llms.txt) — Shared design items.
- [Template Sets]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/template-sets/llms.txt) — Combined templates.
- [Version Control]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/version-control/llms.txt) — Version management.
- [Exporting and Importing]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/exporting-importing/llms.txt) — Component migration.
- [Workflows]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workflows/llms.txt) — Document workflows.
- [Design Component Approval]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-approval/llms.txt) — Approval process.
- [WorkCenter and Document Wizard]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workcenter/llms.txt) — Browser-based document creation.
- [Outlook Integration]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/outlook-integration/llms.txt) — ActiveDocs in Outlook.
